messages.content: You are an IELTS vocabulary expert. Generate 10 IELTS vocabulary questions as a JSON array. Return ONLY the JSON array, no other text. Format: [{"id": "va1", "chineseMeaning": "n. 测试; 考验", "options": ["test", "exam", "quiz", "trial"], "correctAnswer": "test", "difficulty": "A2"}]. Mix difficulties A2/B1/B2/C1.
Generate 10 IELTS vocab questions with Chinese meanings.
